features: ❤Superior Quality Material - Our nail files are made of upgraded material of wooden, which is environmentally friendly, providing you a comfortable nail doing experience.
❤Ultra-thin Design - These lightweight nail files are easy and convenient to use. Just apply light pressure and you can see results immediately, but they will not bend!

❤Double-Sided Emery Boards - 100/180 Grit Double Sided Gel Files:100 Grit are rough gravel side,Fast/Easy to remove nail gel,Suitable for toe nail or gel/acrylic nails,Hard natural fingernails.180 is medium grit,idea for shaping edge of natural nails.
❤Washable Nail Files - These double-sided emery boards can be washed with water, which is quick & easy to clean.

❤Perfectly for Salons And Home - 12 pieces professional quality nail files are washable and can be re-used, provide you a great solution to maintain your beautiful acrylic, natural and false nails. You can have in professional salons and DIY nail art at home.
description: Product description 100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: If there is any question about the product quality or other aspects that make you disappointed, please contact us and we offer a lifetime warranty or a full refund. Safety Warning CAUTION: This product has sharp edges and may cause injury if not used properly. Avoid back-and-forth sawing motions while filing nails. Please handle with care.
